$description: Dupoin full color token source. L1 primitives, L2 semantic modes, overlays, and chart colors.

active.$description: Icon foreground for selected navigation, active controls, and current product state. Alias: color.brand.active.

danger.$description: Icon foreground for destructive, failed, rejected, blocked, or compliance-risk states. Alias: color.status.danger.fg.

disabled.$description: Icon foreground for disabled controls and unavailable actions. Alias: color.text.disabled.

info.$description: Icon foreground for informational, guidance, and transfer cues. Alias: color.status.info.fg.

inverse.$description: Icon foreground on filled, dark, image, or brand surfaces. Alias: color.text.inverse.

marketDown.$description: Icon foreground for market-down and negative trading direction only. Alias: color.market.down.fg.

marketUp.$description: Icon foreground for market-up and positive trading direction only. Alias: color.market.up.fg.

primary.$description: Icon foreground paired with primary text and key controls. Alias: color.text.primary.

secondary.$description: Icon foreground paired with secondary text, helper actions, and list metadata. Alias: color.text.secondary.

success.$description: Icon foreground for success and completed states. Alias: color.status.success.fg.

tertiary.$description: Icon foreground for quiet metadata, placeholders, and low-emphasis utility affordances. Alias: color.text.tertiary.

warning.$description: Icon foreground for pending, review, caution, and risk-attention states. Alias: color.status.warning.fg.

active.$description: Grey rounded icon container background for selected or product-owned entries. State emphasis must come from color.icon.active foreground, fill style, or adjacent status copy. Uses a stronger neutral grey so icon frames remain visible on grey app backgrounds while staying in the grey iconBg family.

danger.$description: Grey rounded icon container background for destructive, failed, rejected, blocked, or compliance-risk icons. State emphasis must come from color.icon.danger foreground. Uses a stronger neutral grey so icon frames remain visible on grey app backgrounds while staying in the grey iconBg family.

info.$description: Grey rounded icon container background for informational, guidance, and transfer icons. State emphasis must come from color.icon.info foreground. Uses a stronger neutral grey so icon frames remain visible on grey app backgrounds while staying in the grey iconBg family.

inverse.$description: Subtle inverse overlay background for icon containers on dark, filled, image, or brand surfaces. Alias: color.overlay.inverse.subtle.

marketDown.$description: Grey rounded icon container background for market-down and negative trading direction icons. Direction emphasis must come from color.icon.marketDown foreground. Uses a stronger neutral grey so icon frames remain visible on grey app backgrounds while staying in the grey iconBg family.

marketUp.$description: Grey rounded icon container background for market-up and positive trading direction icons. Direction emphasis must come from color.icon.marketUp foreground. Uses a stronger neutral grey so icon frames remain visible on grey app backgrounds while staying in the grey iconBg family.

neutral.$description: Borderless rounded icon container background for neutral utility and status icons. Alias: color.status.neutral.bg. Uses a stronger neutral grey so icon frames remain visible on grey app backgrounds while staying in the grey iconBg family.

subtle.$description: Borderless rounded icon container background for quiet feature-entry or helper icons. Alias: color.surface.subtle.

success.$description: Grey rounded icon container background for success and completed icons. State emphasis must come from color.icon.success foreground. Uses a stronger neutral grey so icon frames remain visible on grey app backgrounds while staying in the grey iconBg family.

warning.$description: Grey rounded icon container background for pending, review, caution, and risk-attention icons. State emphasis must come from color.icon.warning foreground. Uses a stronger neutral grey so icon frames remain visible on grey app backgrounds while staying in the grey iconBg family.

bg.$description: Semantic color toast.bg. Opaque dark surface for global transient feedback.
